creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 148001
transcode-1.1.7_17.patch

The patch to make this build with ffmpeg 2.4 doesn't break it from building with the current ffmpeg in the ports tree, as the function that was being used was deprecated long ago anyways.

As an aside, I had to fix the temporary pkg-plist generation because it failed to account for the export_xvid.so symlink.
